final_prompt.prompt:
Generate an original, non-infringing infographic for a Chinese ethnic minority costume museum guide.

Style/medium: museum exhibition panel, historical costume catalog, cultural heritage infographic, realistic editorial illustration, rice paper textured background
Composition: top-to-bottom layout with fixed sections: header (main title + subtitle + intro), left structural breakdown with Chinese callout lines and close-up details, upper-right material/texture swatches with descriptions, mid-right color palette/pattern samples with cultural explanations, bottom wearing sequence flowchart and core characteristics summary, central full-body figure or central structural diagram depending on subject suitability
Subject: Chinese ethnic minority traditional costume (auto-selected appropriate ethnic group, garment system, and era style)
Scene/backdrop: museum display environment, archival paper texture background in off-white, silk-white, light tea tones
Lighting/mood: neutral museum lighting, professional archival presentation, restrained and scholarly atmosphere
Color palette: natural dye colors typical of Chinese ethnic textiles, earth tones, indigo, red, embroidered accents against paper background
Materials/textures: handwoven fabrics, embroidery threads, silver ornaments, batik patterns, brocade weaves, leather accessories
Text (verbatim): 中国少数民族服饰
Constraints: all text must be simplified Chinese, clear and readable, no garbled characters or English, realistic structural accuracy, authentic material representation, encyclopedic tone
Avoid: poster aesthetic, studio photography look, e-commerce style, anime illustration, cosplay aesthetic, incorrect labeling, fake materials, excessive decoration
